title: CHILD, ADOLESCENT, AND FAMILY SERVICES - 211info
text: LIFESTANCE HEALTH CORVALLIS PROFESSIONAL DRIVE CORVALLIS CHILD, ADOLESCENT, AND FAMILY SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides mental health evaluations; individual, family, and faith-based counseling; and psychiatric medication evaluation and management services. 2211 NW Professional Drive Suite 101 Corvallis, OR 97330 Eligibility: Ages 0-17 Hours: Monday-Friday 8:30am-5pm (541) 452-6796 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (541) 257-5500 Main phone Main phone (541) 452-6796 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for more information FEES: Accepts Medicaid, Medicare, and most private insurance. Sliding scale fees are available for uninsured patients. DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: Benton County Services: Family Counseling * Adolescents Family Counseling * Children Mental Health Evaluation * Adolescents Mental Health Evaluation * Children Psychiatric Medication Services * Adolescents Psychiatric Medication Services * Children Other Services Offered At This Location: MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - MENTAL HEALTH COUNSELING If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
